data.title: CZ's donation address now has 747 BNB. Currently, most of them are scientists or individuals who use tools to participate in batches.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to ai_9684xtpa, CZ said that when you try to make quick money, you often lose money; when you donate money to others, you get more in return - so there is a new angle of "donating 0.0004 BNB to get Meme": 
1. A 0.0004 BNB (0.26 US dollars); 
2. Over 1 million transactions. 
The donation address now has 747 BNB, excluding the previous part of at least 500 $BNB participation, over 330,000 US dollars. It should be noted that most of the current donations are made by scientists or individuals in batches with the help of tools.

data.title: Edison Chen leads 3 CORNERZ to rock the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, presented by Gate.io
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: The Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival, exclusively sponsored by Gate.io, made its debut in Hong Kong. As the largest official special event of the Consensus Conference, the festival invited Edison Chen to lead the Cantonese hip-hop group 3 CORNERZ to perform, bringing a highly tense music stage to the audience and attracting many industry leaders of Web3 to participate.
Edison Chen, known as the "No. 1 Player in Web3", led the 3 CORNERZ group to present a highly recognizable Cantonese hip-hop aesthetic that night, integrating a variety of musical elements to make the live performance extremely experimental and fascinating, instantly igniting the enthusiasm of thousands of audiences in the venue, becoming one of the most talked-about performances of the festival.
In 2025, the Consensus Conference landed in Hong Kong for the first time, and this time Gate.io also realized the debut of the Token of Love Hong Kong Music Festival. Since its establishment in 2013, Gate.io has rapidly developed into one of the world's earliest and most well-known cryptocurrency exchanges, with more than 21 million users and a market share that ranks TOP4 in the industry. In 2025, Gate.io officially became the exclusive cryptocurrency exchange partner of the F1 Red Bull Racing Team, further expanding the global influence of blockchain.
Disclaimer
This event is for entertainment and social purposes only. The content of this article does not constitute an offer, solicitation or recommendation of any product or service. Gate.io does not promote or provide any products or services in Hong Kong and other restricted areas. Please note that Gate.io may restrict or prohibit the use of all or part of its services in restricted areas.

data.title: Vitalik: The blockchain community and the entire world are currently in a relatively dangerous state
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Vitalik Buterin said: "I think the blockchain community, and the entire world, is in a relatively dangerous state. There are many things happening that have no long-term value, or even malicious, and these sentiments and the people behind them get a lot of attention. But we can't just shout against these things and not ask for a better alternative. So our goal should be to make this alternative well and demonstrate that a stable and brighter future is possible. Here I am talking about both the blockchain circle (if Memecoin, which fell 97% in one day, is not our future, then what is?) and a macro-social aspect, but at Devcon a political scientist told me that one of the reasons he respects Ethereum very much is that we are a truly open and decentralized ecosystem, and we have succeeded at this scale so far, which gives him hope. So if we can succeed in this way, the positive impact on the world may be huge, and it will give many people examples of success that they can follow."

data.title: Maestro, a DeFi infrastructure service provider on the Bitcoin chain, completes $3 million in seed round financing, led by Draper Associates and others
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Maestro, an enterprise-level DeFi infrastructure service provider on the Bitcoin chain, announced the completion of a $3 million seed round of financing, led by Wave Digital Assets and Draper Associates, with participation from UTXO Management, Bitcoin Frontier Fund, Draper Dragon and Necto Labs. The new funds are intended to be used to build a decentralized financial ecosystem based on the Bitcoin blockchain, including developer tools and innovative solutions such as high-performance APIs and memory pool meta-protocol indexes. (globenewswire)

data.title: Vitalik: There is no such thing as ETH 3.0 now
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Vitalik said that there is no such thing as ETH 3.0 now.
Some people will say that Justin Drake's 5-year plan is, but that plan is only the consensus layer, not the execution layer, so it is only part of the future of the Ethereum blockchain
The relationship and balance between L1 and L2 is an execution layer issue. Here is another roadmap: strengthen the capabilities of L1 (increase gaslimit, add stateless verification (such as Verkle) and other functions, etc.), improve interoperability across L2, improve blobs, etc. The question of whether L2 pays enough transaction fees to L1 cannot be viewed too much from a short-term perspective. For example:
* Before 4844, everyone's complaints were the opposite: Is L1 sucking the blood of L2?
* Now, the blob fee in the last 30 days is 500 ETH;
* If the blob target is increased from 3 to 128, according to our plan, if the blob gasprice is the same, it will burn 21333 ETH every month.
So the narrative here is prone to changing quickly, and now we need to strengthen L1 so that what should happen in L1 can happen in L1.

data.title: An investor suffered losses due to long positions in BTC and SOL tokens and has added 3.5 million USDC margin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, an investor suffered losses of approximately US$9.85 million due to long positions in BTC, SOL and other tokens. After the market fell, he added another 3.5 million USDC margin in Hyperliquid today.

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Discusses Advantages And Risks Of Centralized Sequencers
data.description:
According to Odaily, Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has highlighted several advantages of centralized sequencers in blockchain technology. He noted that centralized sequencers can prevent issues like frontrunning, offer instant preconfirmations, and facilitate the transition of traditional applications to blockchain by converting servers into sequencers.

Buterin emphasized that while centralized sequencers have benefits, they also pose risks. To mitigate these risks, blockchain's decentralized features can be employed. Mechanisms like forced inclusion can prevent sequencers from censoring users, and optimistic or zk-proof systems can ensure sequencers do not alter or violate application rules, such as inflating a token or NFT collection.

Despite the potential of centralized sequencers, Buterin cautioned against relying solely on them to address issues. He advocated for a dual approach that includes both centralized sequencers and the capability to conduct transactions directly on Layer 1 or through based rollups. This approach allows for the evaluation of which method is more suitable for different applications.

Buterin also stressed the importance of maintaining the ability for ordinary users to send censorship-resistant transactions, underscoring its critical role in the blockchain ecosystem.
